arts.ttl: Chelsea told they can re-sign Guehi at a MASSIVE discount
arts.sum: Chelsea may be able to re-sign Marc Guehi for as little as €48 million this month, according to a report. Newcastle United were quoted an eye-watering, borderline world-record price for the defender in the summer, but Chelsea will apparently be able to re-sign the academy graduate for a much more affordable fee this month.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Chelsea vs Morecambe on TV? How to watch FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Chelsea will take on League Two side Morecambe FC in the third round of the FA Cup on Saturday afternoon - but it won't be on mainstream television

arts.ttl: 'Chelsea FA Cup tie is being overshadowed and Tyson Fury link is frustrating'
arts.sum: Morecambe fans will protest over ownership situation during their FA Cup third round tie away to Chelsea on Saturday afternoon with their place in the EFL at risk

arts.ttl: Juventus Target Chelsea’s Disasi as Defensive Reinforcement
arts.sum: Juventus are actively pursuing a central defender as part of their January transfer strategy, with Chelsea's Axel Disasi emerging as a notable target. The club is looking to bolster its defence, particularly given the injuries to key players Bremer and Cabal, which necessitate at least one new signing in that position.
